name: Tick

attacks.name: Leeching Jump
attacks.tell: It crouches for a split second before leaping straight at the player.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or sidestep right as it launches.
attacks.notes: Its only attack, but every hit restores a bit of health.

description: A small, highly aggressive arachnid that usually appears in groups near the stump and other upper-yard zones. It is simple on its own, but a full tick swarm becomes extremely annoying.
behavior: It behaves like a late-game lawn mite: patrolling in small swarms and relying on a single leaping bite with no projectiles or complicated tricks.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and steals a small amount of life with every successful leap. The real danger comes when several land in sequence and keep you backing up.
interactionWithCreatures: Like other advanced mite relatives, it will hunt aphids and weevils that wander too close. Against larger creatures it mostly sticks to self-defense.
strategy: Spicy is the obvious answer. Their leaps are easy to block, so the real advice is to avoid being surrounded and erase the group before the life steal adds up.
respawnInfo: 2 days by default. In the Brawny Boy Bin it takes 3 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to dust. Its leap steals a small amount of life, acting like a miniature mosquito swarm.
